r2.text: C4: no logged compression curve on a real external corpus yet — the empirical depth claim is unproven until a breath log on outside material is committed

r3.text: C5: triangulation harness ships without heterogeneous-panel receipts — run a real multi-model panel and commit the report

r4.text: C6: this ledger's own longitudinal history starts here — one committed session is not yet a compounding record

r5.text: P-9's gate is honesty-based, not machine-checkable; it needs a standing cross-model audit harness to stay real at scale

r6.text: preserve-the-target is self-attested: the same agent can name a surrogate target and certify its own binding. Documented in the skill; the open work is a standing external binding-check harness (M1/M6) for high-stakes moves

r7.text: cross-model review judged publication should wait for empirical receipts (C4/C5); rejected — the repo names those gaps rather than claiming them. Revisit if readers take the status as overclaim

sessions.note: v0.2.0 release session: consistency enforcement, engine bug fixes (metabolism classifier, MDL never-worse-than-raw, refute vote parsing), plugin packaging, three-round adversarial review (stranger/deslop/codex)
